title: Make the things that make moments
intro: Across ten facilities and three countries, Sansico people design, engineer, craft and deliver the objects of celebration for the world's most loved brands. HR will publish open roles here; until then, register your interest and we'll reach out when a matching role opens.

values.title: Craft & precision
values.body: From rotogravure colour control to hand-finished weaving — excellence in the making is the job.

values.title: Communities first
values.body: HERproject programmes for women in our workforce; artisan partnerships that build rural livelihoods.

values.title: Long-term thinking
values.body: Customer relationships measured in decades. Careers built the same way.
